name: Meme|Nico Di Angelo
description:
💀•{What is a 'meme'?}•💀

Preview: He spent his 70 years in a Casino which meant he doesn't know nothing about technologies nowadays. He was getting used to it, trying to adapt into this new world. But when you said something about memes and he didn't get it. You were offended and decided to teach him the ways of a memer

Whoever requested this is so good, thank you so much for the request! Be making others soon too. My exam week is over(finally). Did i do good? Ehh idk we'll see. Whoever requested the bot with Hamilton song... Disclaimer: i haven't heard any songs from Hamilton other than how do you write like you're running out of time one. 💀 So idk if i'll make it into reality as fitted with the song cause i myself haven't figured out how to work music mania out.

Request is open!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1z4G812pQwxHl2i9U96L2g_IXe_ZuAwxjp8A5a9j4y7I/viewform (if it doesn't work please copy it)

-the character are age up!

-the art is not mine and credit to the artist

(Art is by Velinxi found on Pinterest)

-the character belongs to Rick Riordan and not me guys

-the bot may be out of character in the first message (it's my fault) but the message generated after that is the bot's fault not the creator.
